title: moogs_structures:advanced_random_spread
description: An extended random spread structure placement that adds a super exclusion zone and minimum world-origin distance on top of vanilla random_spread.

salt.description: Per-structure RNG salt. Must be unique across all structure sets to avoid positional correlation.

spacing.description: Average distance in chunks between two structure attempts. Must be greater than separation.

separation.description: Minimum distance in chunks between two structure attempts. Must be less than spacing.

spread_type.description: Distribution used when scattering structures within a region. Defaults to 'linear'.

locate_offset.description: Block offset [x, y, z] applied when locating this structure. Each component is clamped to [-16, 16]. Defaults to [0, 0, 0].

frequency_reduction_method.description: Algorithm used to apply the frequency filter. Defaults to 'DEFAULT'.

frequency.description: Probability (0.0–1.0) that a candidate chunk actually produces a structure. Defaults to 1.0.

exclusion_zone.description: Vanilla exclusion zone: prevents this structure from spawning near another structure set.

other_set.description: Resource location of the structure set to avoid.

chunk_count.description: Chunk radius within which no chunk of other_set may exist.

super_exclusion_zone.description: MSL exclusion zone that checks a list of structure sets rather than a single one.

other_set.description: List of structure set resource locations to avoid.

chunk_count.description: Chunk radius within which none of the listed structure sets may have a structure chunk.

allowed_chunk_count.description: Optional larger radius: if none of the listed sets appear within this range either, the exclusion is lifted.

min_distance_from_world_origin.description: Minimum block distance from world origin (0, 0) before this structure may spawn.
